roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S ADD TO CAL MOTN RE PUB DEF CNFLCT, MOT AMEND, MOT CONSOLIDATE FILED

/CAL DA MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT & CONSOLIDATE/X  AS PART OF A NEGOTATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION AND-OR CPO'S ARE HARVEY WAIVED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURTNO,18004567,/VD:03-18-19 FOR TRIAL/SATERM/

/CAL:I&A, P&C/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO CHECK IN WITH ACM 2 TIMES PER WEEK IN PERSON/X:THE COURT SUGGESTS ANGER MANAGMENTPROGRAMS/NTW/LDTR:03-27-19/SA1:ANTHONY JAMAL HOLLAND/SA2:28 NIAGRA AVE,SF CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP BY SF  SHERIFF'S DEPT/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:TRIAL/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:MATTER PREVIOUSLY DISMISSED/
/CAL:SHERIFF'S WARRANT DISCHARGE/CTORD:SHERIFF'S WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/SHER/BAIL:5,000/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE DATES/
/CAL: DA MOTION TO AMEND AND CONSOLIDATE/CONT/DOP/X: CONFIRM 03-18-19 TRIALDATE IN M17/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 50/X:TRANSFERRED FORTHWITH TO DEPT, 50 FOR ARRAIGNMENT/
